title: senecio scopulinus
intro: Senecio scopulinus, also known as the mountain groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio scopulinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
